title: ECL (Easy Chunk Loader)
description: It was never that easy to have chunks always loaded.
body:
**Easy Chunk Loader** is a DataPack that allows you to **keep chunks** that you select **always loaded**.
This is very useful to keep your **farms always running**.

By running the command "_**/trigger ecl**_ ", you will get access to a menu where you can:
- Add a new loaded chunk (By clicking green option)
- Remove a loaded chunk (By clicking red option)
- Toggle the Loaded-Chunks Radar (By clicking blue option)
- See the total number of loaded chunks

\
_You can see more stuff I created, projects I'm working in and suggest new projects and ideas in my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RZC9aDRT8n)._
